# This Week's Earnings and Economic Calendar (May 4 - May 8): A pivotal earnings week testing the hype around optical communications and AI semiconductors! Keep an eye on earnings from PayPal, Palantir, Toyota, NTT, and others. Watch for US employment statistics and the sustainability of interventions. ![[Cool Guy]Key Points for This Week The Tokyo market this week, following the long holiday weekend, isMarket attention is focused on the sustainability of yen-buying interventions conducted by the government and the Bank of Japan at the end of April, and their potential impact on Japanese corporate earnings forecasts. In terms of individual stocks, earnings reports scheduled for May 8 from major companies like $Toyota Motor (7203.JP)$and$Sony Group (6758.JP)$ 、 $Nintendo (7974.JP)$ 、 $IHI (7013.JP)$ 、 $NTT (9432.JP)$ will influence the direction of the index.
